title: Loot Tweaks For RPG Series - Utility Datapack for Prominence II
description: This Datapack Removes all of Archers Expansion RPG Series' Armor pieces. Originally used for Prominence II, this Datapack can be easily modified into removing other, all or just different Items from that series from any Loot table
body:
All this modpack does is change the Loot table to not include the War Archer, Tundra Archer and the Deadeye Archer Armor set. Massive thanks again to [https://www.curseforge.com/members/fichteee/projects](https://www.curseforge.com/members/fichteee/projects) for helping me once again with this datapack.

This Datapack does nothing when none of the RPG mods is installed. This Datapack includes Crusader armor, Prior armor, all Spellblades rune armors, Berserker armor, Assassin armor, all of the Wizard armors(Fire, Frost and Arcane). This Datapack can be easily modified to your Packs desire.

Also a big Thank you to Afterlyte who has actually found out how to make this work, Since the RPG series uses a tag cache, that one has to be modified on top of the existing datapack. The entire content of the needed json can be found in the update patchnotes.
